backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and contact form submission with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the Home page inside the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section component displaying the center's mission story, director quote card, and four value cards (compassion, goal-oriented, holistic, family partnership) with icons and stats.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section component with four info cards (address, hours, email, phone) and a form that submits name/phone/email/message inquiries to the backend, handling loading, success, and error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the SCLC logo (white variant), quick navigation links, address, director name, logo download button, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the landing page hero section with the SCLC logo, tagline badge, main heading, mission statement, and smooth-scroll CTA buttons. Includes decorative animated background elements.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer around child components.
frontend/src/components/LogoDownloadButt: Provides a button that opens a print window containing the SCLC SVG logo at 800×800 resolution, enabling high-quality logo download via the browser's print/save dialog.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll anchor links, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/SCLCLogo.tsx: Renders the SCLC logo as an img tag from a static PNG asset, supporting configurable size and a 'white' CSS-filter variant.
Displays a grid of six therapy service cards (Speech, OT, Physio, Behavioral, Special Ed, Sensory) with icons, descriptions, and tags in a styled section.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a `useSubmitInquiry` React Query mutation hook that calls the actor's `submitInquiry` method and invalidates the 'inquiries' query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm-toned light/dark color theme with utility gradient classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that composes the Hero, About, Services, and Contact sections in order.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Nunito/Inter), oklch-based color tokens (warm, sage, golden palettes), border radii, and box shadows, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Sisodiya Child Learning Centre website, its implemented features (hero, about, services, contact, theming, logo), architectural notes, and a known spelling inconsistency fix request.
